summary: Comprehensive testing of team formation features completed successfully. All 13 backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend team formation UI fully functional with all tabs, team management, and admin controls working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/skills - returns 18 APM skills correctly
PUT /api/profile/onboarding - saves skills field with profile data
POST /api/admin/projects - creates project with goals and skills_required
GET /api/projects/{id} - returns project with goals and skills_required
POST /api/projects/{id}/preferences - saves team preferences successfully
GET /api/projects/{id}/my-preference - returns saved preferences
GET /api/projects/{id}/preferences/count - returns preference count
GET /api/projects/{id}/my-team - returns not_published status initially
POST /api/admin/projects/{id}/generate-teams - AI team generation working (Gemini 3 Flash)
GET /api/admin/projects/{id}/teams - returns draft teams with member details
POST /api/admin/projects/{id}/publish-teams - publishes teams and sends notifications
GET /api/projects/{id}/my-team - returns published team with member details
GET /api/admin/analytics - still works correctly
Frontend: Login page renders correctly
Frontend: Member dashboard loads with team notifications
Frontend: Project detail page shows My Team, Preferences, Recommendations tabs
Frontend: Team formation tabs all functional and clickable
Frontend: Published team 'Fintech AI Pioneers' displays correctly with 2 members
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows team management buttons (Users icon) per project
Frontend: Team management dialog shows generate/publish controls
Frontend: Skills required badges display on projects
Frontend: Project goals section displays correctly
Frontend: Team preferences interface working (skills offered/wanted sections present)

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All team formation UI elements working correctly)
